articles.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Breakthrough Reasoning Capabilities
articles.summary: OpenAI's latest model demonstrates significant leaps in multi-step reasoning, mathematics, and code generation — passing the bar exam in the 90th percentile.

articles.title: Anthropic's Claude 4 Sets New Benchmark on Long-Context Understanding
articles.summary: Claude 4 achieves state-of-the-art results on MMLU and HumanEval, with a 1M-token context window enabling entire codebases to be analyzed at once.

articles.title: Google DeepMind Releases Gemini Ultra 2 for Enterprise Customers
articles.summary: Gemini Ultra 2 brings native multimodal reasoning across text, images, video, and audio in a single unified model, now available via Google Cloud.

articles.title: GitHub Copilot Now Generates Full Pull Requests Autonomously
articles.summary: Microsoft's Copilot has evolved into a fully agentic coding assistant, capable of cloning repos, writing code, running tests, and submitting PRs.

articles.title: Midjourney v7 Introduces Consistent Characters Across Scenes
articles.summary: Midjourney's new model maintains consistent character appearances across multiple generated images — a breakthrough for animation studios and game developers.

articles.title: Perplexity AI Hits 50 Million Monthly Active Users
articles.summary: Perplexity's AI-native search engine has reached 50M MAU, driven by its ability to cite sources, answer follow-ups, and integrate with enterprise knowledge bases.

articles.title: The EU AI Act Enters Full Enforcement — What It Means for Developers
articles.summary: With the EU AI Act now in full force, developers of high-risk AI systems must document training data, implement human oversight, and register with national authorities.

articles.title: Meta Releases Llama 4 Under Open License, Shaking the AI Market
articles.summary: Meta's Llama 4 series includes models up to 400B parameters, released under a commercial-friendly license that lets companies fine-tune without royalties.

articles.title: AI Agents Are Taking Over Software Development Workflows
articles.summary: A new wave of autonomous AI agents can handle entire development sprints — from requirements to deployment — with engineers shifting into reviewer roles.

articles.title: Apple Intelligence Gains On-Device LLM With Private Cloud Compute
articles.summary: Apple's latest AI update routes sensitive queries to on-device models and only escalates to Private Cloud Compute for complex tasks, without exposing data.

articles.title: Researchers Achieve 1000x Speedup in AI Inference via New Architecture
articles.summary: A Stanford and MIT collaboration introduces Sparse Mixture-of-Experts routing that activates only 0.1% of parameters per token, dramatically cutting inference cost.

articles.title: AI-Powered Drug Discovery Cuts Clinical Trial Time by 40%
articles.summary: Pharmaceutical companies using AI-driven molecule screening have reduced average drug development timelines from 12 years to under 7.

articles.title: OpenAI's Operator Agent Can Now Shop, Book Travel, and File Taxes
articles.summary: OpenAI expanded its Operator agentic system: it can navigate websites, fill forms, verify identity, and complete multi-step transactions autonomously.

articles.title: Video Generation AI Can Now Produce Feature-Length Films
articles.summary: Sora and competing systems have crossed a new threshold: they can produce coherent, hour-long video narratives with consistent characters and plots.

articles.title: Nvidia Announces Blackwell Ultra GPUs — 10x AI Training Throughput
articles.summary: Nvidia's Blackwell Ultra chips deliver 10 petaflops of AI training compute per GPU, enabling trillion-parameter models to train in days instead of months.

articles.title: Microsoft Copilot+ PCs Sell Out as AI PC Wave Hits Mainstream
articles.summary: AI-native PCs with dedicated neural processing units have hit mainstream adoption, with Microsoft's Copilot+ lineup exceeding one million units in the first week.

articles.title: AI Models Are Now Writing 40% of All New Code on GitHub
articles.summary: GitHub's annual Octoverse report reveals AI-generated code now accounts for 40% of all committed code, jumping from 26% the year prior.

articles.title: The Hidden Environmental Cost of Training Large Language Models
articles.summary: A new study reveals training a frontier LLM emits as much CO2 as 300 transatlantic flights, prompting calls for greener compute infrastructure.

articles.title: Gemini Live Can Now Hold Real-Time Voice Conversations in 50 Languages
articles.summary: Google's Gemini Live now supports real-time, low-latency voice conversations in 50 languages with near-native fluency, integrating with Android and Google Home.

articles.title: Anthropic Publishes Safety Blueprint for Agentic AI Systems
articles.summary: Anthropic's paper outlines principles for safe autonomous AI agents: minimal footprint, reversible actions, human escalation, and auditable decision trails.
